Leadership weeks • Partner offsites • Lake District

Explore Cumbria

Country-house hospitality, handled properly.

For leadership weeks, partner offsites, and team gatherings of 20 to 120, across thirteen houses.

Start a Conversation Request the Cumbria book
Single-house takeovers · Multi-house programmes · 13 country houses across the region

The Region

Why Cumbria

Cumbria has space England does not produce easily. Country houses with enough beds for a leadership team under one roof. Lake-front estates with grounds. The county sits between Manchester and Glasgow, which means a national team travels in once and is back the same day.

The valleys vary. Ullswater is wide and quiet on the eastern side. Windermere is busier on the western road and calmer above it. Coniston runs south, narrower, with fewer cars. The character of the week tends to come from the valley, not the hotel.

Cumbria stays private. The region does not draw press or crowds. Board meetings, partner weeks, leadership offsites.

The region

The journey

Thirteen houses across the region. Click a pin for the notes we keep on each.

Click the pins. Scroll the page, not the map.

Skip to properties →

A Walk Through the Lakes

Through the valleys, with a chapter to the north

A route that follows the grain of the landscape, stopping wherever someone has taken the trouble to do things properly.

01 / 06

Ullswater Valley, Penrith

Askham Hall

A fourteenth-century castle gatehouse, still in Lowther hands. The kitchen gardens feed Allium directly.

Sits east of Ullswater, the estate behind, the lake valley in front. A good first stop on the eastern side.

One Michelin star · Allium at Askham Hall · Estate kitchen and garden

Enquire about this house →
02 / 06

Grasmere, Central Lakes

Forest Side

A Victorian hunting lodge on the edge of Grasmere, fells behind, the lake five minutes down the hill. The kitchen is serious. Tasting menus from what is in season on the land outside.

Small enough to hold a group on its own terms, not absorb it.

One Michelin star · Country-house dining · Grasmere valley

Enquire about this house →
03 / 06

Windermere, Western Shores

Linthwaite House + Gilpin

Two properties within a few miles of each other on Windermere's quieter western flank. Linthwaite sits directly above the lake. The Gilpin and its Lake House sit back, in their own grounds. Two Michelin-starred kitchens between them: Henrock at Linthwaite, SOURCE at the Gilpin.

They hold a larger party between them without losing sight of the water.

Henrock: One Michelin star, Simon Rogan · SOURCE at Gilpin: One Michelin star

Enquire about this house →
04 / 06

Southern Lakes, High Newton

Coniston and Heft

Coniston Water sits south of the central fells, wider and less crowded than the rest. Heft, the village inn at High Newton, has a Michelin star. Regional produce, cooked without ceremony.

The southern lakes give you the landscape without the Windermere footfall. Often the right shape for a smaller group.

Heft: One Michelin star · Village inn · Regional produce

Enquire about this house →
05 / 06

Cartmel, Southern Cumbria

L'Enclume

Simon Rogan's flagship. Three Michelin stars, inside a twelfth-century smithy in Cartmel village. The kitchen runs straight from the farm, and anything on the plate can be walked to in under an hour.

A private dinner here is the dinner of the week. Getting the room is the hard part. That part we handle.

Three Michelin stars · Simon Rogan flagship · Farm-to-table, Cartmel

Enquire about this house →
06 / 06

Keswick, Bassenthwaite and Borrowdale

North to Bassenthwaite

North of the Penrith to Cartmel line is a different Cumbria. Bassenthwaite in the shadow of Skiddaw. Derwentwater south of Keswick. Whinlatter Forest folded between them. Less travelled, less on the standard circuit.

Three properties hold this corner for us. Armathwaite Hall on Bassenthwaite. Lodore Falls on Derwentwater, with the falls running behind the hotel. The Cottage in the Wood inside Whinlatter, one Michelin star.

Armathwaite Hall · Lodore Falls · The Cottage in the Wood

Enquire about these houses →

Tell us what you need.

Ullswater Grasmere Windermere Coniston Cartmel Bassenthwaite

A Walk Through the Lakes

From Penrith to Cartmel

West through the valleys.

Ullswater Valley, Penrith

Askham Hall

A fourteenth-century castle gatehouse, still in Lowther hands. The kitchen gardens feed Allium directly. East of Ullswater, the estate behind, the lake valley in front. A good first stop.

One Michelin star · Allium · Estate kitchen and garden

Enquire →

Grasmere, Central Lakes

Forest Side

A Victorian hunting lodge on the edge of Grasmere, fells behind, the lake five minutes down the hill. The kitchen is serious. Tasting menus from what is in season on the land outside.

One Michelin star · Country-house dining · Grasmere valley

Enquire →

Windermere, Western Shores

Linthwaite House + Gilpin

Two properties a few miles apart on Windermere's quieter western flank. Two Michelin-starred kitchens between them: Henrock at Linthwaite, SOURCE at the Gilpin. They hold a larger party between them without losing sight of the water.

Henrock: One Michelin star, Simon Rogan · SOURCE at Gilpin: One Michelin star

Enquire →

Southern Lakes, High Newton

Coniston and Heft

Coniston Water sits south of the central fells, wider and less crowded than the rest. Heft, the village inn at High Newton, has a Michelin star. Regional produce, cooked without ceremony.

Heft: One Michelin star · Village inn · Regional produce

Enquire →

Cartmel, Southern Cumbria

L'Enclume

Simon Rogan's flagship. Three Michelin stars, inside a twelfth-century smithy in Cartmel village. A private dinner here is the dinner of the week. Getting the room is the hard part. That part we handle.

Three Michelin stars · Simon Rogan flagship · Farm-to-table, Cartmel

Enquire →

Keswick, Bassenthwaite and Borrowdale

North to Bassenthwaite

North of the Penrith to Cartmel line is a different Cumbria. Bassenthwaite in the shadow of Skiddaw. Derwentwater south of Keswick. Whinlatter Forest folded between them. Armathwaite Hall, Lodore Falls, and The Cottage in the Wood hold this corner for us.

Armathwaite Hall · Lodore Falls · The Cottage in the Wood

Enquire →

Tell us what you need.

The houses

Where we put people in Cumbria

The properties we return to, chosen for the kitchen as often as the view. Some you will know. Some you will not. All of them we have walked ourselves.

Region
Capacity
Kitchen

Bassenthwaite Lake · Country house

Armathwaite Hall

Seventeenth-century manor on Bassenthwaite Lake, 400 acres, full spa, stables. The Lake District's big grand house. Handles larger groups without feeling processed.

60+ guests

Penrith · Country house

Askham Hall

Lowther estate, one Michelin star at Allium, kitchen garden on the doorstep. Medieval and unhurried.

Up to 30 guests Michelin

Whinlatter Forest · Restaurant with rooms

The Cottage in the Wood

Inside the Whinlatter Forest. 9 bedrooms upstairs, a one-Michelin-star kitchen below. Jack and Beth Bond took the reins in 2024.

Up to 30 guests Michelin

Borrowdale · Country house

Lodore Falls

On the southern shore of Derwentwater, with the falls rising directly behind the hotel. Spa, lake-facing rooms, and the Borrowdale valley on the doorstep.

60+ guests

Grasmere · Country house

Forest Side

Victorian gothic house on the edge of Grasmere. One Michelin star.

30-60 guests Michelin

Windermere · Country house

Holbeck Ghyll

Former hunting lodge above Windermere with views across to the Langdale Pikes. Oak-panelled rooms, two AA Rosettes, a serious wine list.

30-60 guests

Ambleside · Country house

The Samling

Above Windermere, set on 15 acres. The rooms are grand and the drive up feels like leaving the century behind.

Up to 30 guests

Windermere · Country house

Langdale Chase

Grade II listed manor on the eastern shore of Windermere, reopened 2023 after a full restoration. Two AA Rosettes, Small Luxury Hotels of the World.

30-60 guests

Windermere · Country house

Linthwaite House

Directly above the lake. Henrock holds one Michelin star. Simon Rogan. Tarn walks from the door and the water visible from most rooms.

30-60 guests Michelin

Windermere · Country house

Gilpin Hotel & Lake House

Cedar spa suites, SOURCE holds one Michelin star, family run since 1987. Takes a larger party without losing the feel of the house.

30-60 guests Michelin

Windermere · Country house

Storrs Hall

Grade II* Georgian mansion on its own promontory into Windermere. Adults-only, 30 rooms, landscaped gardens running to the lake.

30-60 guests

High Newton · Village inn

Heft

A Michelin star, no fuss. Kevin Tickle's daily-changing tasting menu in a village inn above the southern Lakes. Regional produce, no ceremony.

Up to 30 guests Michelin

Cartmel · Restaurant with rooms

L'Enclume

Simon Rogan's three-star flagship inside a twelfth-century smithy. Getting the room is the hard part.

Up to 30 guests Michelin

Single house, multi-house, or a full week across the region. Tell us the brief and we'll come back with the shape.

Brief a programme

The food

Kitchens of the region

For its size, Cumbria carries more Michelin stars than any English county outside London. A three-star flagship in Cartmel. Several one-star kitchens along the lakes. A working tradition of cooking that takes the landscape seriously.

For a leadership week or a private dinner, the region offers more than a room. We put the right kitchens into your week, property by property, a table for the whole group or a dinner one evening for six.

L'Enclume Cartmel
Three Michelin stars · Simon Rogan's flagship
Henrock at Linthwaite House Windermere
One Michelin star · Simon Rogan
Forest Side Grasmere
One Michelin star · country-house dining
Old Stamp House Ambleside
One Michelin star · Cumbrian tasting menu
Heft High Newton
One Michelin star · village inn, regional produce
Allium at Askham Hall Penrith
One Michelin star · estate kitchen and garden
SOURCE at The Gilpin Hotel Windermere
One Michelin star · sustainable tasting menu
The Cottage in the Wood Whinlatter Forest
One Michelin star · Jack and Beth Bond
Plan a Cumbrian programme

How we work

Our part in this

Tell us what the week needs to feel like and we will come back with accommodation that fits the group.

Start a conversation →

Trusted by professional services partners and PE leadership teams.

Booking

Deposit at confirmation, balance per the host property's terms.

Cancellation

Sliding scale per property. We surface the schedule in writing before any deposit is taken.

From the first brief to the final guest departure, you have one point of contact: me.

Myles Longfield

Founder, ProLuxe Travel

ProLuxe Travel

Corporate & luxury travel management.
